productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men  Black Casual Shoe
description: It's comfort and style unparalleled once you step into this pair of leather shoes from lee cooper. Crafted from supple and durable material to offer exemplary comfort, and designed with stylish cuts, this shoe makes for a fabulous addition to your casual wardrobe. Team it with jeans and casual shirts. Upper Leather upper with strategically placed overlays and stitch detailing for durability and enhanced shoe structure High ankle for enhanced support to the lower leg and for style Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Suede lining along the outer collar for style Padded tongue and collar with a fabric inner lining for sweat-free comfort Synthetic footbed with cushioning for all-day comfort Haul loop for easy on/off and to hang the shoes from a backpack Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with strategically placed lugs throughout the heel and forefoot for absolute grip and traction Curved midfoot and raised heel for ergonomic comfort Shoe care Wipe away dust with a clean and dry cloth Use a branded leather conditioner when needed Do not store in direct sunlight
